title: Private Restorative Sessions
alt: Hands playing a crystal singing bowl beside a reclining participant
description: Individual sessions are available for anyone moving through seasons of depletion, transition, recovery, burnout, grief, or overwhelm. Each is fully personalized — restorative positioning, guided meditation, introductory breathwork, and immersive sound. Private group sound baths are also available for small gatherings, retreats, wellness spaces, families, or friends seeking a shared restorative experience.
